# prog2.tri2.ativ3

## Classes e Objetos 
Classe: É o "molde", "fôrma" ou "projeto" abstrato que define quais dados e comportamentos algo terá.
Objeto: É a representação física e concreta gerada a partir desse molde (a instância que de fato ocupa espaço na memória do computador).

### Exemplo 1
[Abrir exemplo no TypeScript Playground](https://www.typescriptlang.org/play/?&install-plugin=@structured-types/instant-documentation-plugin#code/PTAECkFcGcBcEsBm8DGBDBA3NAuAUCKAIKiQIA28AXmgOcDHA9qACYCmoK5a00b0oDowBGAKzaxGAgJeg07AI6R5aUErQA7Fs3Z9RaALZTQAJzYAHM3w2w0JgmDY34Lef1bMDkLczNpyapAc5lLQQQaCcPLMABQYJvDCZFIAlIKcjAYhJrYGTpKgMQbSktrQKQB0Dg6gAHL8sBxsAB5sWeSMADSkBqoojDaqwpooAIcJqiG8kPCs0QKWAM+W8Mb9RqAIsJDcJunQ-tqdNf7SEeygjOZsJnQAr+5m3CirGioCqmzc3es6FovQeAFDgHJRsKogGoAUQilkYAHNbr0GMxEN4XgN-KAQuwTABbwzGMjwSg0PZojS0B4CJpwExkSC3AQXVxlY6EbJnOSXBL5OhMbkicSSBY3AxAjhoRGQcx2OZldLrbK5fLGNo9NA1ABfGlQqm8LjcoHIi3heu6iDQL0oth83KM7G48PV2g8BjxusYVTwXB4AgAwgNbAAhEZ2eCqADeeFAsc2QJ2dhwoDp8A08IA3DG4wdyNpkxpIAZhDcs9nY-0NHTIChJCYYltEyZk6n091c9oAJK6l7+AtFksmNLRuOjzYAC3g0Aqjd2oAAvPHtrss2O47BJ9OO8xF9vu6gI+RV3GAL54cusCxSIF2GLYDrN0CF4s3FLJzCMFygEdridTirbqAADUi73owJjHmulbQIw5Dgh08IxAABgAIv8gIFBcABKAAkOGRmBJgnqYbD+NQ0QVEhKSQaAZ4Xgc6D1oR-YvkO76fiw34XqOSCFIRoAADyLhu-7bsO3G-iJW6HMwAC0oH+OBNG-hkVawfBCLIQAymgYKXqAuH4YRxF+KSFFUcpp6COQfBcSpo7QepFQITEABEOl5swaZhMgLz5OCrnURJsZnqOdGji0iTwCYHnaDEb6gB+X4-lBAwwXBzmaUh+FSTOCa7MRUxhLMhmRrl24nhZF5nnR0GwKptgAIwLk+bAAO6gIGgyhhojERm5ACy4ZoK53SNQADJNQU+kGaCNRUkXCNFsWMPFWaVk1FTsFMN71gArFN62zfNDG3gATIdM2DPNi3LTJa1AA)

## Atributos e Métodos
Atributos: São as variáveis dentro de uma classe que guardam o estado ou as características do objeto (ex: saldo, nome).
Métodos: São as funções dentro de uma classe que definem o que o objeto pode fazer ou como ele pode interagir (ex: depositar(), atacar()).

### Exemplos 1 e 2
[Abrir exemplo no TypeScript Playground](https://www.typescriptlang.org/pt/play/?#code/PQKhCgAIUheeGKclq3o+qMBSBVAZQBUBJAMRIGEBBUgNWsgBEB5SIgUQFlqAuSWgCUSAITxEWBSB0hcAkxNYFskFgGdIAQwAuAJwCWAIwCu2gPYaAppAC2AS-MATC5DUBjs1siHNa688hLADsAY00ABzVjABtNG2DzQJtIAAUWFgA6aWjLDWMgy2TPXO1NAJUACkcyiwBKQMhPELMbcLNdUvigxIqAM3yAc4BX3PrCyGMbTUgAL6D9MMDu-WrHa2iAZ4BzBc0MlRhKFvDNXU0Bj0hm5JTdMy2zqYvPMnyQ-TMgzWjICpSyWq8FQAOWm-wANJBVi4KiVdKZjGcNOFEb4xpB+kFhrlXJc--39--8AYBQGAS+b7UCILCCEw1AAOLcAI-AEFuhRTtYRzdNMIiaKEx7rhUZCUsUyRcKYmiGPo0TFtG6F6GYsTVLUoEfsBLGsWx7E--AACSiYtxLRacBWQAAPpAx3GWY-CCG9H1fRkaUFQ9+VFUVTFECU2EBNQhjtNUTrJNQXGfH6tiBuFmj8bFBQAO58Z8pSCWEg4VAARNQlFjgzkIAIzTVztQGTYRMk9TexrE1PatQArNzBk2WodGWBkHVbIz6OY5o2MIWzhNBMT-EZDah3A84Z088+TEcWb5sW5+THgZB0FwVwkAiPwKRsjLXxq9GOD3J4+GERuPmHUOSx6NYLB2g6dSm5b0cxwBXE8RoLu6G7qvjCFkAhvEWnufpEndtUXU9flvTtGEheWXt0t6PZjmZ5Y2c6VskL55o5e6JCJe6GXGeBb110LSlGR12TLSWFtyUXi3sUt+PUOd4sGXz5o8N7Tomh0xU3wUs7rufKnNh9QNjj9yp0uy-L9wVA9kOD3Xf1r4sH1b2YQ+jwVACED3G0lz8ZPSY49SYNhU6c9S6aG-oVPa-9LCAOARUGU2E2yrHrj3bqQV+BHxPhPYkU93wZQQcsZB49RpOUHlPAAPBlWaWDT743PgrK+N8Lx3wxGYfQ85dB3H9GYT+EDtpCj8DQq4dCcgX0VtfT6t835aC2O0aY25IBMJwcWP60YW4ZC-uPHakDEZSWRopCsnhla6CxuMEQeNbLaEgOFNkbCyaWEpknFO2MlZnFkYqDWnNpqQgAEyzSlvjKxWpLF3HsY43e7tCiMxYF3DWABmbxkAxbGxsXcfQGQH6nAqME7S9U9JAA)


## Construtores
É um método especial executado automaticamente no exato instante em que o objeto nasce. Serve para exigir parâmetros obrigatórios, aplicar validações iniciais e preparar o objeto para uso seguro. 

### Exemplos 1 e 2
[Abrir exemplo no TypeScript Playground](https://www.typescriptlang.org/pt/play/?#code/PQKhCgAIUheeGKclq3o+qMBSBVAZQBUBJAMRIGEBBUgNWsgBEB5SIgUQFlqAuSSiwByxAEp4iLURwKQAFIJFFxlSaICU2SGwDGAewB2AZwAuAJwCuJvWcgBLyHsgBbAKY6AhgYCWR504BHC1dIAHMPMy8TEI9IbwNo0LNvABMPFJCUpz0AIwArV2tIAyd-NwSnDMgjVwstAw8jHW9y6wA6SA4AGxCWgAdXKqCQi2dHfMKnGrzY+NMvZvSneP1nPp6ivQs4gwA3AEOu1L02rRhKPTWIjwBzgGOnVcgABTM9JI9nW4fIMgsDZqGDxdeTPMjqXhaISxMEAGkguz0OgAV5AMjoutdxgVrEZIEdopFfI5tiZvH09HjDFU+m9ad5BulXFS+oCGsSKRkxloarZmcNmmkqdsdMl0o1IK4xsyTEsdvpjL5ogkQp4jE4DD8ABYeGaQUaxABm-3uTkN+xyyU8HS0HDGzxYLHhj0Mpks1lsDgNkByETMrm8kXGyXCJgAz2L+K4epBOSFdsDUhE0Us8VVXAlIml4VoUr4+tc+YaA7jIPpMYSPMSWoNvB5S3JVk4uu9hWXDK4AB4AV+ZaJC-oy6klYWuCUDWmGjmxk2qUtpqsu7hiks7SsD-cghpsXznoQsQcXitMGeip2gcEwV+vN9vSGwwHA4GAwEgAFoP5+v9+f7+---KIQRPRUkgezHN0vQejaFtQjkAADPiFqydsxiMfTmXVSBYgAEhEmbusk1reC+n6Rta67loc9rVqYogZS8B7qByGw0lCKV4K410TC2-inDGrCMr4zsBKEgE9AKltPC6LVKRMXz4QAVgAFgAZgAJmWp8mI4zmue5j8QPgiDRCg2CuEgMD+EoMUslsKpuilU9KOgsx9mQ-Q8TkJhXGQnxCJCFybD7YiUjMB5GNfHnzYt4DuKMPEwL0WVRPE6JO2saSzIMeSdJsN3kg97SHN08x9MM53XdM33QnhfQzB92Tet8jwAC8LC6Rqjo6obZtD7HIGzqbc8zuabF66O5Kc18Na1kYxgTFtbALI2fhqVDHkaDUm9cPV4m3MwviyFbwEh19ofmAw4YRswkZRsC0eMDGEYdzDkN75Mcay0X7YEgql8DL4zEasvZ9MH1N70SgFmjVfMoyu2He3i-MX3+FfN2TS3ApvQD6Ps7XAu94Ctvj8AAjLwGmJ9F5IV3hEZap1zqXQAfbH4zNQHwgXgJc+AJL5mCakAA)

## Instanciação de Objetos
É o ato de criar um objeto real a partir de uma classe usando a palavra-chave new (ex: new Usuario()). Cada instanciação cria um ciclo de vida e um bloco de memória totalmente isolado dos outros.

### Exemplos 1 e 2
[Abrir exemplo no TypeScript Playground](https://www.typescriptlang.org/pt/play/?#code/PQKhCgAIUheeGKclq3o+qMBSBVAZQBUBJAMRIGEBBUgNWsgBEB5SIgUQFlqAuSEgDli1QZRLUA4wGG2TDpBYAhHByIsCkABSCOAdQCU2SIwCWAOwDOAFwCG5gManbAc4DHAe0gAHAKYAnAFtTa19IB39nf3CAZ+9nS0gAMwBby1MHW0SwiwATXz9zfPNQxPzIAFdAyEDfS0CvBoAbcuMtByasy18DADpISltc20gLGwAjx2dIAHMAoZHvD0tLCtNIboqffzjIrzrvVy9y2sCYyNte4xhKD0DD-1dPcLvIAAV--4LcjJzNmyN9RcXtUafF8ZPcoDhqSO8lAS4AK91K4DzCns-ni-IbDAcDgYDASAAWmfL9fb-fH8-X+-P+-d4f1BKCwABKTDUAA4twJj8FwABfTQup0iQkFYOJTPi5R4KsACHeyJFolYZmGra6pAHA2EMHhGPeT6-nR9EMYxb7gB0XSQFhFTIqakAAN5QJA5h3L4-A2JE5gzAA3PxwJNBYwmQEWHgZr49hwMkoLdFJ-GSqh-gVA4nL+Fogm1CJhYWDMBi8fxkCQNYwbWr0JlhLAAlCVJtkAL63rZraPEZVl8bZtn2Y5MlyWphYVL4HmQN53n--gONTlAZDd9JhHQ3YjCh9V5d2nFNNRD681b1t-qxKzvPL3ZeEFtb8OYVRFgEsUUdY2pmWJMxqSNcskqEI1abZc1RQZHhGd2bsewEgU2XZDnlt2andrFCW+eYJsncnwWp45PvakHHB584TLh-x8Ucw+RBVal1DpZlvKi7D1g+I7TKMK5fUOwrw1dQADF1M2d93Q9KCt-Vy0PWij4tE9+EP1BHZXBdaXNV03TM93z07kDvavTvr92nkbHYvtuoTp+970peWOTD4V-nTKw7viOH0VJ89x4ShegXyvgWP2d9-6AKfi-B2odfBAA)

## Modificadores de Acesso
### Controles de visibilidade para proteger o código:
public: Qualquer parte do código do sistema pode ler ou alterar.
private: Apenas a própria classe onde ele foi criado pode ler ou alterar.
protected: Apenas a própria classe e as classes que herdam dela (filhas) têm acesso.

### Exemplos 1 e 2 
[Abrir exemplo no TypeScript Playground](https://www.typescriptlang.org/pt/play/?#-eN24AdPYwlG4uMpDADnAGOXgCDCcbkNGmCkmR8tN--CCMIojiKI1D0OoDQWHEJhqAAcW4OR+H+Y5aRiAh1xfalMVUE0zUqSB2mcVR8klAI7DQzCSKk6SZNk3DwH8LUe0gf5x3Yu5iwAbygZoRKlOdGi8ZJ+FPE1phuABuHS9T419qRfdjpk4kyyRmSzIAkni3C8VYvBqbtex8MIl1JL8lOuFDIBLU5TPyMCwmUNoimM2pXPM-ROMcByOMCFyzJuGxIG0qKooyF9ii+JKjLgAzkqskrGXKxwvky7KnKaWBIFaxzOPqyAAF9It00T-H6QZyh6wJlGudrqBvK88rc-R5jNSbFvMnFIFWNw3ALD8ip0qLfExMqKrNVI6VCAAJezppyuamSvGxCuKhrGoq7qcpqlbAkmvqGpXe5pkZclwn+gbDsgQGc0gTlkmuPrBus3jAn486-PKG6sru9r1oK-htt28J9teqLoeB07ms+9q4HgO92sR8AkYkohQumGpqG20I6RuNo5AUmKMmi8dvvCAB3FTTiydSqWUAAifJrlCAABKrki+Us5f0OW+QAJgAZgAFgAVjlmwrO-RICy+d0bnljgMMMjFwnLFltkxEo9LE3gteFrJKqd82yL9qtqd6jz0I4cRxDYa5qh9AF1yyUJ+B1P0TQNYIYgAS5tU1zQAQhQ4O5NLsvy6w4OKKomj6K4SANH4K79SGXd8iA+PIERZFUWmABDk1JjUEDB3AudICu99P3E9CK7n+fSMU6lnG7lE0UHg6os9kat0TvG+rT0Cx-tLVB-4aZllWLoLIjuRE1zZxQpLcLvVqQpnDfbnzgeALsiGy2yRxWzMoeYa48b6BPuUVE59L5dBepDSmXxQExE6sg8GiDIEb06pg1EjMkZL2UkwC4WxZQu0qOzFeSI165g3q9QIywk4TXRFAtwyhEyhHiLMQoKUL4uCvqEeBDVPJdHSPxJIAUkgtG6J-D8T4PYjzAgaOwDUMHMI3gAak6qo0+qIVRsK6Jwyk6IPL8iFObZUJVLZExtm4O2AADPEbh2jHnRAPXRiwAAkmlEHIP6vwcQHivHaJYf1OxQcoqDWZuhVmp4Pwcy5jzPmGgBbTFPNUYh2ZRYSyISuBKctxBrC6NsX2fJjZCgFEHZcJDQhfHoWuccoQCBqNRMoQUQcJJVOzF8HBbgb4SSjjHO88dHClkYSnLcvJMwxCVikPySQyFdFzPUyoBcgA)

## Propriedades Somente Leitura
Garante a imutabilidade de um atributo após ele ser definido no construtor. Impede que o valor seja sobrescrito acidentalmente durante a execução do programa (útil para IDs ou tokens).

### Exemplos 1 e 2
[Abrir exemplo no TypeScript Playground](https://www.typescriptlang.org/pt/play/?#code/PQKhCgAIUheeGKclq3o+qMBSBVAZQBUBJAMRIGEBBUgNWsgBEB5SIgUQFlqAuSAAoAlFsJIcm1JhwKQCLLhwBynSABkOJIniGMAFEI5SWStQE0AlNkhsAtgHsAJgEsAZs4DGAQ0f2ATpAA5H4Apj72AHYANgCegZDOtgAOIY4hkACOAK7pSX72ec6pPiEAzpAeABZeAG5lkKUhAFZetpChZR5+zgAuXuVeSQDP5dZeFZGlPX5ZAOcAx-aQvpD2AEZNIT32ADSQefY9IQDmIREr4x6TzlMAVxEezuOVNz1D3d7LS47hy+khrhCvXs5SuUS8Rz8XhuADprDBKPZkl4oQsllc2gJ8scobYvGjIGQsg9nJEvFFIHoBGQLLxrEpxtS9tsfpBxmVplkelkoX9luFQSDuXiGiEAokuQBDuoUpL+fY+PyLGGQDhtEJXUqlV4hPGjaB8gQsFh7SJpNmQWxcrxrZxRZw-c3mjm--HMpdbBCOzpk85y0MgUL7KyDwIr0B04oc449mi2KGnixyLFM8zkp6F5ShhB04BspyyvDSqYXy2r8vq5KAF9wC6ij2Bdc4lmoNZ-B+U42moHTJh6CzjlakIAHdIAM44jPsPQACIsiyB0sIATn29a9nWgzwTebohMgOgzh+Up1oserQmOZqkXSWBIGOkJTveUlmO5Q9I3CdaXJUgRPW9FZGyTJZ8t6x7qscWrNu2xwsIARnRoHXMwjghBEUU-lKDFOxRfhAgdeJ3UGM4-KiIFuShOFX1KexaZhKJ7GODbltWy10y7FYMVYphVm6FbfKiXhDpm+H7rQ3qtIVxWlZw3rqNohimKo-hEQidxU1RABX+pzWoWxbU7dJ6PZtZoXKPQCBONMMyzdIdamPnjeEsUamcWZ7GUzDlaD4PyN0rU5G9wSdb10rkuDKzYkga65U8npsoS9qLJDROuxi+wuX4aszbFerzKZzl0v8PRk-sVP08c5lEhCfO08XOM1jFWqAFYAAY+5KszkvKpqa9T2rR44zPh9hXPm65WrZ5bzOup6lSiH6lYhpGrwxsgKjJrC0KY7eiIFojvwfauaPnE59bKh6HoklKXgMMGZwYRi0dI6uGEMTu+qmYsxCGzDmG0ODnBThxUU+t7CSz2K+PWMIJ49FlipBBN8kEQNrlAt6d8H5PxfsAaoHgADWYptRHF-kiTGKkcZ40aATImHEUQAEIgA)

## Métodos Estáticos (static)
Funções que pertencem diretamente à classe e não às instâncias individuais. Você os chama usando o nome da classe (ex: Math.random()), sem precisar criar um objeto com new.

### Exemplos 1 e 2
[Abrir exemplo no TypeScript Playground](https://www.typescriptlang.org/pt/play/?#code/PQKhCgAIUheeGKclq3o+qMBSBVAZQBUBJAMRIGEBBUgNWsgBEB5SIgUQFlqAuSLgEmiLVgUgdiAQdKUW4gBTFaVAJTYBAS4AuAewAmugM6QApke0BD7QEsAxscgAHUwCdtpgHZ3TAW0gAB5B2ADYAhkZGpmb+RjYANGaQngDHuoEmRgCuEZA2nhYAR942EQB0EiHmkEZpkBo2+qZhNiZOYa5hkABmWZ4A5wCv1Vm2ITZWrqUmAI5Z0anpTS6eTf6GZhZhG-kerp5LC14AFln+ugBGAFamemUaMJS6vu2d-XUO-gAKrroA5p1fGF3ukyH07DZdJ4wiFIAovmRVLwNAA5LoIxK9AbDEyjGzjSbTZxZTqZOpNUIdba5cYAN1cfi8HmS6XMDic6T+IUuMMguiy9WgZgAHhz3NSTE1IL4AM-6LLcowVDjfFgsRIObl2DqbIy5LFDapNTzaX6QKVnLqUyLRT7pDS+HQGRzmKy2ByZNy06KvLq6Vx-MKeGwALx16Tscpsf3SCmhvnM7R8RlUiTCAKy7VW6QNOMFMAZ4QhUIlNUufOl5l86QOCfNtvCNrhpmF-C4YW0xzKcU8iXbnbKHtUSVMtImQY2XQ0HJCWRsIPNrKM7M53IuvKlQM8phsnUg4xeXWirtcoxJ1PuQsw15vt7vyGwwHA4GAwEgAFpP1-vz-f3--wBgFAYBL5vtQABCLAAEpMNQADi3CQHwkBPJ43quEY-r1pAeDBvo2zVAoYIDHUeBjBMlhTOi57qK+H7AQxjFMcxP7gNaJioehmGuEQfguJ02jnpAADeUCQHRKJ1E4DIQnq1YmHYVGuJAZx8tctzpAA5NuADuKFQlx-q8S8bgdueCiqJpzhUiperKa61R2JYIR2AqxhiU4WQXOMdg1NoHb2MEpghHEWRGF8VJkGExwMp4xw7toCg+CFNhhfwnhnBcbhIskmVuCJYmQJADKCfscLJaFJgwAAnMOb4AKyQAA1JAADMABMADcYkAL7PkVnneYFWzuj00WxfFEwRZ0lDBZVCjdONJwJeleWuDlGW+FlymiUVRUlSSnhwgtS1xQlH5te1w4wPVdWQNV3VFX1fWgewroTuk1AXP6+F-H4SH8JQxxhEC+HmrutxdC44QoY2URsVCFiQB4LxkHA+loW43HGfxZmdIOc2peFkWnZNiWtQADKo3UOAUuhVGU3J-AoABEX0-em-2MAolMAA2UNZe684ivAs4kKNOIinXiW+AAcABsz6vSxKuq2rn6vRB0GwQhXCQOB-B0DCjTbFhUpMKbkrRBwJqdGDRH+kC-mGPZkAEEGEyhqb63K+rfv+wBbFw5ARvjPhLtMKYBCmvkfwmLtxJDb5I2BaYxwqi0ISh40ugKH4mf8BYUyeH8OXffTzRHQn+23IdMSZ2U+ShFkTRGKzAACLPDgAZN39f4o33izq3rNlF3j2QC9A1eT5fkBb53SOx2HQos8phxmvhcxyXOVF7HBV7cVtdlbWphlDHvgWefuh4E4-GUBE6-U714AvXRvFbNmSHfa4v3-eBCMCjaH7lnY2GxYAhzAd7SO0di5xzKGnDO+Js6GFZh4Cwph275wHp8cegCkanzIEvZ26QIEoOgVHbe8DF6uCdivNerM9pXF0HUOIIRaRdCKng2mmEGZM1ZuzX+nN-DgThBwd8QJ8SQFpM5HOAB+JEYsQEoN0M-HhFdGb-AET-P+Ii4SrzrDQuhhhFGJEIcQ021MgA)

## Propriedades Estáticas (static)
Variáveis ou constantes que pertencem à classe em si. O valor é compartilhado globalmente entre todas as instâncias (como um contador de quantos objetos foram criados no total).

### Exemplos 1 e 2
[Abrir exemplo no TypeScript Playground](https://www.typescriptlang.org/pt/play/?#code/PQKhCgAIUheeGKclq3o+qMBSBVAZQBUBJAMRIGEBBUgNWsgBEB5SIgUQFlqAuSAAoAlFsJIcm1JhwKQZRAIOkasgBTFaVAJTZBAJwD2ABz0BLAKYATAIaXzAZ0gOALgEPnpgMbXH1vQFtrAC9zADtrf0gbSwNHAEcAV3NIewBjg0hPA38jPw8AGwALW1jIIwM9SGcDG19HXVNQ+2cAI9DPUx8o5ITAzPyfe2SDBO6AM0bzSKym52tQ5wduzINQiYBzBL1rAHP0qOt+weT1-IMAI2t8--3B--aGiV3elkBPahO13GMjXNR97VA00INgxDUPLXoq2MowqhI0sRiCvYq6U01fgY1j+MDdFuPxfjhNpbBO2LrNyGK0ryvrrNZ4Xtet6nvwj4bFsuzIwykAADKZvWsrJEw2QALehKCCNbQ29KlZQAxpuYMErir3s+0eaFphhGw4AY6zPl5PmwY+RJ+o4UYxt48RJGUGmLO0jIuGYPq3MkAAHkBer8hxyph6yCh0pRygAViHz4OAZdUSUS0n5+YJShPkACekB0CQkgAPo8AAGiQPAqWpGlBTt2l6fXRlN-VbYxO3Xd0BwxssJQvdSBwfcCFIQjUCwY-+OpmmQFP+kzbBRDzY2GTQ6zsOMqem306D4Mh8zMNw6eEJ0CZhwuCuC4oEYWgdTDrGDqHGIeg7g937kPEe1A7pAA)

## Encapsulamento
O ato de esconder a complexidade interna de uma classe e proteger seus dados de modificações externas diretas, expondo apenas o que for estritamente necessário por meio de canais seguros de comunicação (métodos).

### Exemplos 1 e 2
[Abrir exemplo no TypeScript Playground](https://www.typescriptlang.org/pt/play/?#code/PQKhCgAIUheeGKclq3o+qMBSBVAZQBUBJAMRIGEBBUgNWsgBEB5SIgUQFlqAuSDgDkaABQJ4AMtS5CiLbJDYBTAHYBjAIYAHAM4BXADYaAtqoAuAe0gW1hsxus7IAEyX2DACyVPXkAJbGWgZKpir2AOcAx1Z+YUoATioOvnrG1gBGAFZuVkqQSgAeWgCveQraqhpOqQ6xZgkAZhpqeWoWYfEWRs4OABQaZvEaAG4Alz55AOZu9fE6ADSQOjMJTnnGo5bOFk5aAF-pBn5tOgCUAHSQChzB-oFKvt72205t8Z2Bfi--xhA4YKQORKxzMABAsWskDEaOlIuHkdDij0cK9HROiJsm2rJHkHAkjSFinHhiE4cpKmqWpqHgGoRg6E4dH2Hg+hAnWADeUDqvEE4DHkAD6EquPwKipOkCRwJAAAMADcMGQJAR6kmoljxL0bqHMcd4Ako-DHrEkyrsZAC+3mQHBTEsQyJR5FYbZZXkrLsg4yyTBSGhmSFRxqJA0xmLOL69Nid5OS5pk+T5mq+ionIeDq5y2XOXk+YlZkpexZizDKQTHA4DjRn6vgjpMVbarkTYtkqqJsvOsRHomAo6KVeihRV-41a4vQqBYYokHODmNfEcVmT5fgNOi52XXOkAADzuZAAA+P3hW9L6QAAfJAACMABMbn3S1LVHl0goAO5AiovQAERXUDHbdhK-iTOdQw9AAhGjpz9bDkBtRSKjkwND2dd1vVA7AAMaJjrjk4lg0pUQTzcts1HpGyPTTGk1Cae0JKQHohkWVYLMjojtHtPpsvIuj5Ey--BtDiGg3IZglqEiCHPzyAhJhLDYZsMgINHy0CKoWHSLMfhpgyBshhM8CwKCliDBiiIlqVNEiQAAAaGLyAMdMBh+AABJjIKKkUoeKABSBxnNwDc3grzWSKgBaZ2FhoUWXcJY8mqjoR2CslBK0oOfS+18AR1S8sk4w5xYGZiBM43JAcDJ6E7HLBccpphLBDM6V07pjTOCvPYTMmU7x7FMJ0FwVhfEJOScnVO6c0bROzrEkM3dS5LABOcPRBilHGPymYuqZMgA)

## Herança
Mecanismo que permite que uma classe herde automaticamente todas as características e comportamentos de outra classe, evitando a duplicação de código e criando relações de parentesco.

### Exemplos 1 e 2
[Abrir exemplo no TypeScript Playground](https://www.typescriptlang.org/pt/play/?#code/PQKhCgAIUheeGKclq3o+qMBSBVAZQBUBJAMRIGEBBUgNWsgBEB5SIgUQFlqAuSABIcAStQByAcerZIjABYBTAE4BDAHYBzlZAAOygLYBLAC4LIARwCuZy-u0BjADYqAzi7MAzQ47nbFSgBMzFWMlQwAjS2MAexdIM30AS5iA2MggyFsHZzczGR0VQwAaXSVo-WiANwU1VMhtJQUo70MALxUNAGPo9LN7AGeAwwBzHr6w9TrG5w0AV4U4uUNlAEOlK0N7V17IY0MdHpkACgAiRMz9E4BKADoZGEpygtUunvtyyAAFMuHVO1fIGRLGp7IZomoVI5IEdPmQrrwZGJtLCSj1GiodGVqiYVPoajEdo5+sNNtpzh4FCYegclJA8WCdu99AcXIYARkPMC5gtIDJopY6QsnCphgp9Ds9izoYY1KYlO57HtwS5bpAOOLWS5THY4uCMnIVpBph15nEFqEcXEMvkVI1ZUKxpAlspbRsVCU-C7NNo6p8WGxGi5oo5qpBqWVwo4xT6zAFLDpHKT2XloJABkNRjsPNElHZIInme74lqakFam8MSpQQEVEE4kzgXEVFFyiFSXj7WmPtoCs5KqpIAByBQAD1MtRcg7uqcws7n84XyGwwHA4GAwEgAFptzvd3v9wfD0fjyfj2uN9QAEIsYRMagAcW4sn4Ai9Wh2HFlhhrdZ2eBclhrAyRzCE0eyJu0yaQJQgwjD0l6uAoVznlup5oehGGYXu4DCm4kD-pYtpggh7iQAA3lAXZqFqSiWIqOZHDoliRps8R2N4-A0TKwwlExLH2JAajlAonEWmowxXORAC+q6QLozGJgJHgqK0ygADLRCSahHPCkCVNE37kZRcnvNRwYKDcjiaUcAAGAAkZHGEsLg3EJeJSfmmn8oJPSatqKg3DZVwANyUTJMkodQARGGohg0bWOZOsoNZsYUjglG5ZhmD0SQpD0ymqUoGlaTp9QtnYexbB2ph--1mzHsdnrhcTO67pJbD0m1UTRdExEojEKaxdZ7BCYtLZAXGrdJsnxGolSGLaRwdi4Ipist3FrQZATDVt0O7VZwy2Z+NdAz5yfu0HoqqFCzzaOdznC+aMohPVUn8A5DdN-oUlBaFcnhau-1J4YbtVio0QEFwBBJRzYa9FqC-GEBOXbAcGRMgmYr4raYYCo0QReLFtJ1SbB7ZqPNIAHyPqnM+F8eqlkTi7Q+KcT6d1GqxGog8lBQPrjURuEMW6rX4OtDu6dtpmSjHtPuNkADaUCAC6apq613LLsHMeg6hT0gDPS6Bc75LxXmRNeENN7fR3r9PeG4iCAyYSDMG69ICXhwsqYwpd9BxFgIjFG4DEGn3PqcAA1AAVn0QARiMQATnMRYixVNwAuBUTcNBtcME6JOAQJoaZYKZgyFWBYQZIDnAACz6IABymKpkAA)

## Polimorfismo
A capacidade de objetos de tipos diferentes responderem à mesma chamada de método, mas cada um agindo à sua própria maneira especializada (ex: chamar fazerSom() no cachorro faz "Au", no gato faz "Miau").

### Exemplos 1 e 2
[Abrir exemplo no TypeScript Playground](https://www.typescriptlang.org/pt/play/?#-FFFGXFzpdNDdUqFwlZck4SuEUutuet9g41otCvIagAryByaLJHG6Mw1Aq+A66TxtdxtLzhc6rZQ4vEtD4RXSFXFEgAGugA7sp3DVzMAvo0Xe1IC6EsAnIoA0NRY1vuE5MyPCZkeF5B1mnYNABXjLDc4aZK6WKrFUpHFmYnedIaFKQLjeH1dZEDIGQNgCJRqTQ6fSy9ZCNjhtRdMzx3Q68IZY2m83DZzauH8daagDPmudAWCoQiOLcdmHqmtJhZLgT6X5wycAA8nm0MeroLULutGo-+ddfItQtXRvtn3oz2YBKCt0ByXicujPIU4ZEiwjwpAAtJQihhE4diIl0OKMoMIIPpgeH4QRhHINgwDgOAwDAJA8HUTRtF0fRDGMUxzEscx5GUdQABCkhMNQADi3CQHwiLKhkOosrKLgCEmR5CnEmQEAmlp7ja+J6K+WGXrkAzsVRrH6QZhlGXR4AAmOtbjPI0nIrJdyQAA3lAkDRH8Kg1M5SL9GOviZMUyEaPwKRtKoVhJGSkBKsoaGOZAsWPikuhKMCyHIpkLoCJ5Yk-kuMkSZAyKpIYBTnMMEgACRlfZfmaAAvi6AwANxOTV4AtaZ9TmdZtmhJQvg+OsV4nHY4RcJZXV5TFkAUZABABAWepOFBMFQfmUWDBsOx7LKuodS+zTKE5LlWG5-grQUbiaqJ3kaL5BKaIFwWhRo4WRdFTmxZaiVMkCKVpRlV06qckDlZV1UaDVkBSrUfVwrmGiGHuW6ZOcVheEDPhacMABMACkAz1U1sUtW1ZnhONckCMol6gUNI1jblckOU502zajGQLUtmQsGda1DNsuzyHKO2As5LSvpAijLsih6CFTh2udap1JOdTSZddt3+Q9IVhfwr1M3F8VfclKJ-WrgP7CDVV3eDEXKNSVPDFocz0pUe7eGYLiNKoiZaboBPNa1ZHTViKR3rEKiqMu2gywAjm0Lh9OMPiQHHBJx0kFm4uTdzgFo2JRHikDJASygAF6+EQaM6l88jZJZ-CjVnDN3Iq1ta09QyTZUuJApdXk6jdYONVNlFsHyVzAVuxT6sMfSaPsfIbBuIQDSkTolAAhIHulEJO2VCVY89Jgm1CmXiRrQ++6ywJDTjuoIzc9X1Ji141Z8Je4zkOzfYz39noSU0vJkN+4Bi4qHLhoSuoxq4v2Rs-eQiwACMAAGZBb8wFlwrlXPosDohUyQagkBuljIkNIWQ6iukuI8X4oJTi-AOAHjHJoHMbhZoJWGNQGYOR1LEg7OoaOPZIBIQAIdjmtPIHS01yHSJkWxUmQkuEEn1pAXopckizVUMA3W8gorKI+ufJKP0TYACINH5UKsVSSphFGKCBHY4xb8ibb3kb1H0mgkQ01SMNBRaglGTXkDzNwqj1EXC0RFHRb0DafUMb9Yx1AOjxI3g4wmkBiZkXkXxbwA0wJePCJw3xhJ-GBJcMEjQGiwl60mvohKMSTFcDtm0JJjjUnb2mrvI0+9qCHw0A4Aq3s6GQDoL4ZIQNgq6iSmHPhUc3gmHfhfUYvi9D8HyTkRQABtAAunASAazf5CL6OYdxr9Fh7MyaEYBJy74+NWcAjZTVonfViV0o+fTICcSJAQLoTsZhmBWQSMkyTwALO4boIETsNAcAOZkYFSjYAAD5rEFLBSYNRZTQkDEakAA)

## Abstração
O processo de simplificar o mundo real dentro do software, modelando e trazendo para o código apenas os atributos e ações que são verdadeiramente relevantes para a regra de negócio atual, ignorando detalhes desnecessários.

### Exemplos 1 e 2
[Abrir exemplo no TypeScript Playground](https://www.typescriptlang.org/pt/play/?#code/PQKhCgAIUheeGKclq3o+qMBSBVAZQBUBJAMRIGEBBUgNWsgBEB5SIgUQFlqAuSagCFiAJWoBxgMMtsAgEYBnAC4AnAIYBzgMcB7SAGMdAOwUBLZQFNIFgLaRzOgDZqV1yADMd+l5DUAHCyM1BUggkL8VHQjTCwATNViLEKtDGz8dFSU1G0ClHRDZJIVA-VM1c0hEyABXGzVrIyVTeKq--b5HABLuxVBZ3FTxVz+QKqpmMgrQUIWaUKgCHKgGCnmJX8t2cbiSwaq9UcAGeFqZvMy0s96q1Iu2xiEqnJyk89EYemcTvNZONxW3AusI-YxRKpVZHKY0vbOklAsTHHuuiofi3MN+f7+--hiTKirKtMdw0Wq2r6pURrItlM7OuDMZTl6-rBroDUbAWyA2G8KS1SUDtdpOcVVnG5bVoytbrEcYpyrk57jFeix3oGyNcRdEtXXyBRdxOUH9pcc02FuoGQcSBR8sir4oaR9a5I2jbeKINkIb0KiMniBZbAENE2GqW4uwGUIXQiNtzHqXJT3FfScn0TiZ3qQFFx8vyeJepRIByapJIolqjAsSZIH1nQirS3Wzd6iLDpW8ArfInQvmvYm7bS4CFOE72fd9yDePQzCcLwwR+DwYXu0GSACHMK46jRBzvDo3wAj5PmmzmsGLjFEI1G3CwFgnJEeK9v2y-LhDRLzCSEmCVQdHDqtRbOhTLR0iwAC95dpE4fDyeJfB015IDkAZJ2nWczwjgY7Q8npVJT+sQj0X0rFZcDUhyFRpVdY5SkVOStY1fRiNRBmTW23Llhyfh1VohZZnPrKcusOpTEcW-VHvx-Oovl-pT8J-bsRgFhyUeizDKf8do6DkFcFQHBKR7x0Ag1QBc1BHVGF-EBiNOrHE5CoIwkAAAGCCzhlFcAEWIzQvIABJpLXTNNfCwsNVYJlNhwME-A6EMK+AAtaRDVrM09mBNmygObyG5moXmdhBCiRRtrTMMQxSJSNibMi8R1QN1uC4AYg0cDVFvKsNQkZ5iRhMgYsoQQAACthyjfFSCYyAkYAAcziADMbiAAM4FPG+Ppi9HqfUBqKJll8GBcCEGJCQSg44BUiorSAA)

## Getters e Setters
###Métodos especiais disfarçados de propriedades comuns:
Getter (get): Intercepta e formata um dado no momento em que ele é lido.
Setter (set): Intercepta, valida e filtra um dado antes que ele seja salvo no atributo privado.

### Exemplos 1 e 2
[Abrir exemplo no TypeScript Playground](https://www.typescriptlang.org/pt/play/?#---At6YBRYt3ITjskfh94oA-CSYBS5UdzmuRGIzOBy8fcvYVg5DEcSmBcVzVLcrhWDctpHtDLh+M0DJaxFzlRTFlxPSo6-VE8W878l72D3Pje1b9f6a4AAkmllAbU0OkKey1ICgPAZtTw4RJ7x2WmudIMQ8BWFPuoSgaoiZTR0qtMGyEIZo2PDDOG6gEbxmIijeqCUFgQjijjIa+Ma5Qjrg0dqScwi2EtiKAgFp2iTUcs3PWdwDbtTjtUauwc1hmX4YwyEUD44f23v4e2rkeCiBIIwAgJAAAyDAgA)

## Classes Abstratas (abstract)
Classes conceituais que funcionam puramente como moldes genéricos. Elas não podem ser instanciadas diretamente, servindo apenas de base para outras classes filhas herdarem seus atributos e comportamentos.

### Exemplos 1 e 2
[Abrir exemplo no TypeScript Playground](https://www.typescriptlang.org/pt/play/?#code/PQKhCgAIUheeGKclq3o+qMBSBVAZQBUBJAMRIGEBBUgNWsgBEB5SIgUQFlqAuSSgBlqBAhwKRqAIWIAlWiMgAKaXOqUiASmyQ8AWwCGkAMYAbAwGcLAU0gGARhYAuAJwNOjNlwDdbxgPZ6-pAArnqQAERuFsYhAHYAFsEBccbWAJZOIQamEZD+IZBBACbWpsH2lrYADgZu+SGulpA6ZpY2FgB0kBzmkHEAx8HV-qWQXpDpcc4GqekGxUbF6S7WHnrWcU62SgAGcdYA7gLmVtbUjk0eSpq7kADm1vVPLv6aLdCQtgCXkNWvACs1gsjNYAB5mEIWdLeAwbLY1OqeJ6QBJPRaLTo6GCUQK1NwAc6GJkCkAACq97m5DETgmR4sZ0v44jllGSyJpeDoAHJGdkAGkg3n8xgAV39RrYoXUigAv0xOdLVcoWSCKkaqgqTBEuABmBjSquszhcjRCbnSqvxRlqxVecXSAC8ZTobFDIBj-F0Tu1jXZLm4PKrisEySw2N5iTlvnp+GVmrr-C4DmlwoNggZqptmu0pu5zc0dEoAkFtds9QbjZpBYZVet7DGJaVwsY6qt7jLTABn+7pVtGorfJyjL2QAEAQ8memV1nhHhDqp0AEcQrYvMSS-jFaYEgtRyMXGrRjnVW0zqrdekd5ZBdZvJlZiHIKsmpUd-4sZ9MN+f7+-8hsGAcBwGAYBIAAWkgqDoJg2C4PghDEKQxCQLA6QWFkJhqAAcW4SR+CkKoPVsJhLQ1TIYWCXo1hcAAXh0AmUXFpzqbddznYIxkoLtlnuYJmLCbRQIg5DRLE8SJJg8AHBNA0nBMU5VVIixyMVYVIAAbygP5Xm2YxtmKSBTHSDsQ34ex-H8UxrFmOBIH1UwbAAbmAyASWmVwQn0pMlGqEJ7GM4x+kCax+BNKZ7neDSAF9XMgYTBB7PsjBLMISRYlw2JBCVD2HBd8mDMivQo4ULG0vyAr7IyTLqG5+GFdJDK0ty3KcBJLU6YzTOCWA1VNawXJa9yLCs6xOv8e49gAEg0tqOriELovs-x0mq7rOl2TRBsgWLyv8wLiIsLras5IUVqa7TWvarpjqfXqHOcy7htG8bJt2Ga5q6BaNiWxNVtKI6apDDatu02LdrPVUiDKO9LQMYJwW2OJiiUoroTU4Jmr+faqr0EJFhcShZhyYtidMfg4jCewnlOhqLqG9JdWUT7OqBt5NKetyUhG6zXr2Ig6HGKZhwdZ1FmCkwycgGbWxZUxos27a3Ni5XwF24ToZmZHgguJNFkecJqFQ4b5MM3qDmOZTVMopQImwzZvhcPt-AiLb4rAjhZFkFh+G5Ylfg1CwAFvfFMEwnZlKZnAAI7mJY-EU2wZKuAwAEJwG5+SnG8OyLfYGH7wseHbYIQxMoF12XOz1mOxcG4nPdyAAAl0T3D0UsT-1ZI8cBq7xgmiblpQAHZQeA4TJMnqfp8g430MwnC8KkfgOBNM16jGJgRTCTZh2DWwODBA8PFpZQuElcpIEImxiPJV5DRGoSwJnl-X5Q5O3H0hT2h6I+k3nJMW9YgcQ5lzZka9vJ1wqgdb65wXArkomFVwEUoq7TcsJLgQ4RzuWMC+YIK5bATmfMaKyvg-isVsE+XUpgQhgmGEiSAK4cgEMPGiFwpQVj+D2pVIKUw+zzBcIfY+Bpi603OqAlq3MXrlDeiQBi8xtZ2AeE8Awp8nx1AQcKfgH1rqdFgdQeBIRKIK1BqrCGilf7CJDC4MkTAyBfDBEjFGlj-57hcEAneWxMbcIOo8NwNi7F1TOo1CRV0Op8MZHUIRrjWz+Hrk9KRvMZG21xHEXwmVNhPk9FaBhwREwuEMMOW+1Rxy9hZKqWxZBOjVMrmDNW48wKaw8Io3W7CDAGyvhncB8lqjFCZubI4LjMpuMqbbVY5hhxOw-L03UtSZmdD8XUUZW0gA)

## Métodos Abstratos
Métodos declarados dentro de uma classe abstrata que não possuem corpo de código. Eles servem como um contrato rígido, forçando qualquer classe filha a implementar obrigatoriamente aquela função.

### Exemplos 1 e 2
[Abrir exemplo no TypeScript Playground](https://www.typescriptlang.org/pt/play/?#-KITAPXTGZYa9Ba6KyYyCuawFO6dcwAW466jsWWKJyZCRzSieCLx6ls6pecYqvXitlaAEPHukZvoDAEnC45qk44Zm-YkgZ1EVsscjIFbJr2WNZfYlIdsoyujc2gUjJnlNn7F2eyiepAg4bDWl3PsXGrbGoUmvLBkCUpMI+n8+X8hsMBwOBgMBIABaf8AYBQHASBoFgeBEHgV+P5SCwMhMNQADi3ASPwlANuoqipOWOYkMUxiTOqtLhKkMT5CS4w+AGHB-CmxjVNBf6QcxLGsWxQHgL83iqJYDhfCYxF6KRtgAN5QFk5h-KkPHZHkiSpO4w6qPqpLKPwtHmHMATyYpeLLlekhOGp+rDO4uzVJAIkAL6fpAkDfuw8LLiRkyomoa69Oq--uxTfNy3-6MbB8FIShkj8AQN53jm1CkeUeIFrYeRkOoqTtQGLAzPMSwrEYDEOa3a-r1BqVmrxb02B0hjaEPXXKvi+KieJDkFbq-YHk5iX79kOa+wUG1mB0dhGNcygdHspK2K6w4+bIhMF-Mw7JNBrhSqGbekAAFR20JQG4YDVCYjXHkN4ER+D02tiVZmWt6ZVVevxSAAAZTOL9EIGEzqUP6XUeoiwfofYe8ZT6aHPnZIaek4FvAQUgiwKCIFGHQW2Iw-ARK30dBYSh1DjIaTmJAKyuCqGlHpsjCSRhva+39nQXYBRjj4gZhIiwuZICtFXAfPUfZpFzHTrUWoksPbLUgKtNGGDjC1DCJI8w1iaEAEJ4CQElpLKqlNqoN3YHTQxTMWaaDZpkSQntubPw2rAAWwsyG4m8VQmxyhipqy5pozO-sMkvx+MJWYcs2wAH4nbJNqNwnQiDlDINQUI8RnipHZNKPwSWHTzC-gMI6SWCi64VSAA)

## Sobrescrita de Métodos (override)
O ato de uma classe filha redefinir (substituir) a implementação de um método que ela herdou da classe pai, mudando o comportamento para se adequar à sua própria realidade.

### Exemplos 1 e 2
[Abrir exemplo no TypeScript Playground](https://www.typescriptlang.org/pt/play/?#code/PQKhCgAIUheeGKclq3o+qMBSBVAZQBUBJAMRIGEBBUgNWsgBEB5SIgUQFlqAuSAiwBCAJQ4FKIkkUZMOkLgEmiLVgUgAKFnQ4ipcgJTZIjAM4B7AEYAnAKamAxtYCWAFwCGmgAbmAbresXABNbLwNIAAcAgFs3W0gARwBXeKTozwcAG3dTU3iAM2dMgAtPUyTLU1c3JM9PZ2iIzNto2wA7DwBzgGPzSGMI9yDrXsgQyDTIaIBL13MgvuKAoKG+lcgsnLzI92dI82sJ9Mh--6PtQlgHCsxItCY+l0lUs0OMpeawICtgAO5GXNpnmQNGgGOl+NtITISOHQzgRHA5NU2DzX4gzTO2hYzSIglxIaAARIStidH0JO8JLrxs8T+XRIi7gXZiYMaGlqUGIzIOQAAnBVwujrYYsklLMty5A-OK8rgkcxEGta65xk9br5UG5l6lAzhdEabpIeh2HQcMUxLHsVwkBCPwZAHOkinjgo7RbjjLOaKJEOSe4FKFZcwkeGp+Fh+XFeaXVWyQAAMiSOOHG9h2WPZlbW9EpjEh6gatsSwXyu8r02RF5ui+LGheAA2iQbJkCwAC6-BFZZnfEpVYRMxF1W1QZAL18SjccIETbte0QT7w3YVDfRmT8ryZTuDC6w8nxVTuC5iS1ABkFHFCJ+QGmv4A6R0HJ+ACGdduEs149xcG0fu-BB5BGHpFPKLMLZWwll4QAvBuAAq9yAU8yC0GoLXHMegmIL0gAAA4BCvIEvNDy2AZoiOY9cETNCIA0WwBBe7wIZpVZeq8u6VQAIRiM3gjWqyNUYAQxljdwOM8xCGZqzWwlgkjEm5vQuuV9rCCxUa4H0zRrAVjJtog+R8T76JCOo4kmCpYkH9NcNGfRNb2UPM4eUktGbgFuAEDw9jJZkFuKUFUMIjwzUsP+XEqcVgLFMN49KQA)

## Sobrecarga de Métodos (Method Overloading)
A capacidade de definir várias versões de um mesmo método com o mesmo nome, mas que aceitam diferentes tipos de parâmetros ou quantidades distintas de argumentos.

### Exemplos 1 e 2
[Abrir exemplo no TypeScript Playground](https://www.typescriptlang.org/pt/play/?#-ABaDYdDzRekOBoY0EAV687WhCwGnOi--DxdQiHGHkmEaZoJU-aggnuU0nHsaDYIw0SxPEiTEPAHxFycdoyOyCiqJogBvKBIGE6g5JNO1kiRSAAEZ+A4W8VSDPxwi2dp4nNUp1JaNszPUIUlMifhkxNQIiUgO99gAbnUzTtK2WI9JCAAmYzTPpGzSi-YNsi8c16QCFJojvezoo8ZzyL8Si3MgDzU3LRL434FSRwGdz2U8vyLmRGoXH4bJswiSAAF9vN8soAsgM8+uEkguneIU+m7Qc8m2VJ+1yBpJuDdolx00K+WDLFbUyxyAhyxS8tfaqU0CEqkpcAB+crKq8A7avq21Gua1qg06--3g-MJkpc0Unvpp-+oKnGWsLDP4ERPm+a53QZAp3AAKy8OLZ68dS1-dbKBw+j8B-t5IqgQmZXxvvpSKkAH4+C+CKF+nRKgzk1v0UIGgWqRBzPYPq-97TqDGAaPoXQHo4IiGAmqqYAqBRgkNCWo0UQuD-mfbaW9Dh+BAXaBImZsG4OuqmN6itliKViM-PocAvytG3iEE0-JdgIJcA0ZgPDICnWkeyThkBmp21UfEEYMjOHtwBrMPS2QJF+B+KUEwLh-DvB-gQah4MEahFiHKUQEcmaq0gsJIg6ChY6z1vDUeRsxGQAIXTIM1tEr2wnm6c+PQXYBS5iDXmCIE6AgyD-Xg1dInPh+JE7KsT9FeBdrYduqSeZ8wRlk9gaCFFkLyWwgpRT1AGQAOwGQABwNz6f0-pFS-JAA)

## Parâmetros Opcionais em Métodos 
Parâmetros definidos com um ponto de interrogação (?) que não são obrigatórios de serem preenchidos quando o método é invocado, dando flexibilidade ao desenvolvedor.

### Exemplos 1 e 2
[Abrir exemplo no TypeScript Playground](https://www.typescriptlang.org/pt/play/?#-EAdEYwlMl7psYAOcAY9GSRSAkcgwBVxBozIZV83j8xnCkCCAjIWV4RmUPUxABpdmYrHZHC53Mj-IFIEVLL0XilrAAPQK2ayWIlXFwcwQsNjrHZ1WkOUz+FIAM0RsWK9SKNKM-wOfnsTWmPQlG1ZvS8kRlp1O1AEJEelQ84SOdRuvLca28Tmmx361kOq2sw3aPXGTlC--h7JUgTHOyABuYC5Oc9ZhU0rSdL06wDKMkyzK2PMSO3MiwT+DYljwqpLAAK9NSB7Kc0LwsgRzgKqqq7yIWoigsyBqF6UUZQIlJqDfPxOMgdKf3I2AUOsAB3T8rIQhw-xPIIsjC-rJo+SizCCAAiHAtmsFYHFWuaQPbFgrxRNFkkKKSHHABb9yW5i1rIfJVy2xxVqJVaOBy0wABffC8JInF2kL9svKlURc0VfBdc6WzvF9Ybh+GuzvSdp1nBcuEgCd+EoNT11OARV1ctFwWazy9VGQ6Qeo0CEZp2nR3fH1BAJ3U8CcMozHIzS4vsMoPB-IJaPo36UOSaxhIGUSNNquTBYYjpjDKGUWOMUnzqEjoRLE8XuJkiq1n9MUZlVvN0jSFhwgAQ6JeyVfWc7HIAQlSSB+FSc2rZKgDbALQIPl8UXHdSMKIvAWrQPqzjUtGFq2uMDqMe63TbF2Zm0SGiGxvx0xCdZ9n9zW4Ro1XXLKDMQz-rmxP4sS4zPOz3UPgdRWVqyPbQNZnpRn9mxiViUxQSrpoEsM2vU8bhWlYLrbdrb9sO6qW2ydcI6IiAA)

## Parâmetros Padrão
A atribuição de um valor padrão (ex: timeout: number = 5000) diretamente na assinatura do método. Se o parâmetro não for fornecido, ele assume o valor padrão de forma segura.

### Exemplos 1 e 2
[Abrir exemplo no TypeScript Playground](https://www.typescriptlang.org/pt/play/?#code/PQKhCgAIUheeGKclq3o+qMBSBVAZQBUBJAMRIGEBBUgNWsgBEB5SIgUQFlqAuSAArUASgCGuHIsJYFB1JsIDDLbIICGAJwBHAWwCmAFw0B7AM6QADmoAmGgMfHI1vQDMAlgDs9OyAFcfAG5qADbGGpCmvgBGpgZuBr4GjmqJxjoAh3EAxo4Ajr5qHtaO-pCaAOb+eh5JkACXkKpp8W7FkB5qkFkAFmo6Np1tOnVJxQB0kCSmpo4aeta+AF5l7XpZetOtNnpOOzlFblluxh1u5m1xFo6qAAZuLpAAFACEVhp9AJSWmn1wkEGhDQ3dqOHIaK5ORzDUbGMaqGCUNJvNQAc4cXTSghM5Xe-TRjjIvg8RxOISeAjIH14qmomx8OR0jg6gjIABpIGZvtp9EZOVZbOjvJBocZiucdgIWGw1AArXzWX6DYxZKo1TSQHaqfo1PThfZGNRJcWQagCKaQYJuHRXUwTAByjmqBkKSXZQslLDdwQ2EXRWQ0viOajOXM6+U10GFI1FnOcGI87kq73xkE8Bl1st+DIieiThRRnWznI2zrFqZ1Gg8sccxiiMsMsNUmGbLdbbeQ2GA4HAwGAkAAtIOh8OR6Ox+OJ5Op5Oe33qAAhFjCJjUADi3BN-ERCbceZTcaIVr0xkSGp8wj0+TObhRAFefY86CEwpACLnfCZ1ALjB9ZwPpwBgFAcBI7gFkwRqNMkAXlepiHGoximiQkAAN5QJAvavjsjjOKY1QBMYwQBPML4eOiVjTOqjhxPoJ4GOyjhwbE3idJBkT6JAACsAAMvE6OYVzhHheYeAW6EWNElpZJAUS+KYWSaEwNhmI8H7BPwsQaJ45TsjRx6JFwpj8B4-hRLqfw8bxVL-MYrSoehkDxjM3pjKE5SPDc85yQpRQ4cpxoACQoWpAC+GI+JaOjxDscZBXpdGGSF-FjDcHwANzoSF4BZX+RAloUbTUFEYQKuUQrUGBJyxGUFhuH8XgAO7QZevjXgpiFmo86XgGotVjLJ8mKf5jwAETAHJBRaWYI3pRhfaHrRp78vYxj8JZ3H8T1fUDQpGhKWKo3ABYGywWoI3sgAjLxVlpXN7BHnRXRyUkUWLMp-BXddm3dphIF-f9AODn+C5Liu65cJA85bukwQqqEuzMBs+o4TsAAyxgyp0jxEGoAAenQCDYK2-r9gNk+TE5gRBUGUMG+MXuUZwGsU7z2Y5mFMK4njYam1pmLUy3ogqFoY4WaSOFdACkTzcWMF1fHh7SCqYx1HO4CnFOJkmHF0IRw5oRDGM6wSPJEURJMbxmmbq7JWjaSRWzoZnhLAkCy-LjvO2zjmQHMCSVhE0QW2SADUTxm8HwSRnb-M-hljlZTlmF5bEBWOEVJVqGVPjzpVHjVQpbj4-VehNbTRdqAzTPvCzahdRl+zOXornGO5I0CHMKKgpiMexI4guOI8UtUudusV2MCmw74EEaIbxtD1Zs2YRdV1503Ldtx3ehd+FvP27M8xLK0g+cZLI-soX+MT3r08G0bIQL9x7Ky9xnEfEvfZXZxQA)

## Herança Simples
A relação mais básica de herança, onde uma classe estende diretamente apenas uma única classe pai (ex: Cachorro extends Animal).

### Exemplos 1 e 2
[Abrir exemplo no TypeScript Playground](https://www.typescriptlang.org/pt/play/?#code/PQKhCgAIUheeGKclq3o+qMBSBVAZQBUBJAMRIGEBBUgNWsgBEB5SIgUQFlqAuSABIcAStQByAccYESXAAoAZDgWyRGACwCmAJwCGAOwDnuyAGcAlgFsADgBtNpyAHsAxk+3bNkAI4BXAwAmTpC+liYutrqmpl4AZua26iYOAC6a+gFeAeaeKbqW6WkhYZAAX-rmLiaqEVExkNa65gA0kFraAYHBXp6+pl1mmn2QBZYARtpOjjGWkOb6sZHazpAuAM-ZAObBbrMBvnaVuoYArw4AdKowlE42unqGAMc7t5Byk5t6YU-BZL76LnMTn0ulskAAFHIyABKXiqMQmKGtF53bQpBJJAr6FLBTINSbWbTmTSdTKOACXkFimnMOMg6OsRyxRWs7lWt1ZFh+kFUeIZUwhmgAHvwAAYpACe1i81AClnmcEgeBiywAZJAAN6QSb2fimFJE-SbSAAX1F0POkA4szkLBYrRM7QMxjMVjsDh50BC+iyuiCji8u1ZaPyhVxcXcJV0vhxlgAh+iqq1NvcDOiMsE-F4-KCs8t2pkcsEahz7ujEl4BZZyTj-VT-oDgU1HEEGk1BrMs-jNICZgLPA4XJ4AG4AK4AtLYBU5fJ6YLo3HZ7vWjGdHDGErS40SopBhWltCDTJcvZgz+eL5fkNhgOBwMBgJBx8+X6+3++P5+v9+f9-74-qAAIRYYQmGoABxbg1H4agKjCcwWy8Dh9SsY5nghYQhlMcNIBuGx3DyZlgkAqJNGhf8n1--0Yxw8eBQpNAZhqmoNHi+IElTRIMqTDVk+TFOUiq1M8DIdHMXr7m0-g6sM0rjI45rNEspxrNFTDFaJFWM3ZfCCbSfgAG12qc48DJNABdMalJCu8OcgEnBJSIh91y-KAk5jlucJvmtdl1SqVcVXav0zX2JM9bzL11rRTIVxgj9SogRBVtdB2fJWUh+kA-4e3nKdt3TQmu8pv9-VZvmjpdCW2ZALWziUjmfRfcVH0Dp9mN-byk7TpSPLrSaWwrqC+ZffOBXMlNuOAZet6gnABeY3OWJY5q9egZB2wwb0oA)

## Cadeia de Herança
Uma árvore genealógica de herança multinível onde uma classe filha é herdada por outra classe, e assim por diante (A -> B -> C), acumulando propriedades e métodos ao longo de toda a linhagem.

### Exemplos 1 e 2
[Abrir exemplo no TypeScript Playground](https://www.typescriptlang.org/pt/play/?#-RLKKxDdRcnksxIBdm05xeABf-l08x8DlpAHcLPNFmY5Q0QYS5pdIEjPiwWO0clo9DNIMoSu4DBjxmFILpChkjPU4v0-BZLAsnty-NoLZQtAZgmEoWUOg79JAtNTdOCDJVndBIJYHNNk9kk0Y5otlpDdOsXu1uSkrH4Mgk-ABL94FZOPZb84lGJsC6K0qyqObB9Q+655zAz2dz+fIbDAcDgYDAM57Tdb7c73d7-cHw9Hg+r9fUY4sKRMagAcW4Kn4dG0QVUvm1hkSRBDCw5iTsMZ0VMjA4BYlhWasNm2CJTw3Y84PghDEO3cAakKSAn2pN9IAAbygOknAAI0GVQBlFJ47HhSAxl0TQcLwyAOnBfJxijLUfjsAAiJ8XywwYfi0BxLg4iIAG48IAX3ASSULyNCY3iDJhUjHpaQw18tTohj5kI4i0wIrozA+Dl1C4SECgo-hqNo3CGIY2JQxYy42M4oyzGxPZslkvTzCbITRIkqSVzXAQnm+DgfG0YNqQyEpS0SeTvmSJxinMOL0L0dSHBk2oQoU8LIq6WIRiFZTNFpBKMhs--I++aPY4z+Hgo7v2b9L6XGHm3ABhdCbrgHtXMwQA)

## Tratamento de Exceções (throw, try, catch)
###O controle de erros em tempo de execução:
throw: Lança/dispara um erro no sistema quando algo dá errado.
try: Bloco onde você executa o código que corre o risco de falhar.
catch: Bloco que captura o erro lançado, impedindo o app de travar e permitindo que você tome uma ação corretiva.

### Exemplos 1 e 2
[Abrir exemplo no TypeScript Playground](https://www.typescriptlang.org/pt/play/?#-7hDMJybDM3iFECeaYNBMGwXByDYMA4DgMAwCQEyGGYVh2E4bheH4QRhEEShaHUAAQiwAhMNQADi3CQHwkB0C0GTBP8pRhEwLbZnU7aNJAABa0xBJoZBFCUPIcMBKSgv4swZqMdioehRGqWp6kadh4BRBmlKQJQLRVApjTZMaUDtoUIZ3FEITcd0ziaK4-C+OMIbTCYIbOa50z4o23nOJAZmQMFkAZLkWghnA8CQAADDYgXmSFvLnLMADujbeOlUmzA5ABEXGZEkvH8gFb7CY2vENq8J4fGxACEuU2AA3JAykkNswEHGyBbiQEiVev1HKFFy6ytdGTXmZ64BTSR7DJB4xwMYOzhsb+EzUNpWxJI40KGXAGXpQZ+RGfGbiaM14BlglwWbL422QN85o6vG+0PMdALdJk9maAAjDFJhxRNN1bQE-YAt+PSaLlmpPR4oy8LlJiPdqcMBBdnq7VWlyaI6-DDKW8VBdCINg46eXUMtq3eOtWgGYsjjDfG+KI0BswAj4lKuL+zWtWhdMM24+aOma1O8lOV5BDcizTchs2afLCuKxhs3kZR1F0VwkBkfw8IBFaSSnTyOAECwYg8rJuS9IzULaG4Hg+P4HGyHJn6QO1aRkncbFKWhSt+-7xE6bGKQADLeKmzgW7010WVZ9zthCcaR1sluQwAVt2vhEJEjj8NtzjzD0vn4zHwVXUTSVDSNxumwC8rOKymgZ1s2cRI4F1JRjlbVlojqE-1wN3aD3gAqlEK+FDNdm-MHte3kjQLBiox+pqnJNotAQhmn3iBJAaSuG+mIJ8EziAo1QNJQ9O-Db4gWei1ymalUfxQkKwE2gvOyQOM7YZtyZEix6MNPqndJoy1mtnbaww1gU0aFTCYZFNp3R2v2CO+0FjpTDhHKOkMLq3XurdVOjMHhBFgJAVBnI66J28BCHBUNTSEN6O7FibFIDnyQd2MGEMoY4OtrxB4YEeifgRiYRhQD9yuDRg-NCxpPRAA)

## Classes e Herança de Classes de Erro
O ato de criar as suas próprias categorias de erro estendendo a classe nativa Error (ex: class ErroValidacao extends Error). Isso permite capturar erros de forma tipada e saber exatamente a causa de uma falha específica no sistema.

### Exemplos 1 e 2
[Abrir exemplo no TypeScript Playground](https://www.typescriptlang.org/pt/play/?#code/PQKhCgAIUheeGKclq3o+qMBSBVAZQBUBJAMRIGEBBUgNWsgBEB5SIgUQFlqAuSSgBlqBAhwKQOkABIcAStQByAccZMpQkWInrJcuWwAUlQkRZc9BuQQCU2AQCcAlgEMHkAMYAbFwGdfAKa+kAAmAZABDg4A9p4Arr4ALtEAtk4AXi4hfhFJAQB2YYWxLp4+--LEQ8E3T1wrsXCinPr5q1Mbkuh4ALeDM6laHozxZUrTWKylryyJZaK0-LOFn+4oa6Ai4Lh3kRSDs5atN4eo6QQIouLo-IXUqTxLoxIY1nRMF9zA73d7-fIbDAcDgYDASAAWiv15vt7v94fj6fz6fp-P1AAQiw5ExqABxbhID4SQWkecI5ACNEl3CRRIPFMZYlqYJmgeOZIA-P1biIJxoQVfYnjIRYVl8Owz0vF8KMoqjqNvcBvCNECYjoRYnGyc5YgCAAPXpCmQs1IAAbygeEfRXOIPGSBxDHZH1sz2fguW9FEbEE4TIGnOI3WkgpfDklIbAAbjUyBEiWJw1Sqdk4EgAAiFDomYgEXHYmyjPUgBfcBPLo8o+Jiah-WTWCUVbCJuIKEI-M9IT1O2USHHEyTtNkvCFJXJSVJi9SNK0mTdLwwzjNM8yQUs8JYFs+yAqCXxomC1tXOEzzvPo-wkVaNciSyjo4jDM4InyFc3EMQJ8hWNLuWU-hamiVjVOyyAhmJUaVhBLwChRUzIAAHkgAAWTLjPU0yYgAdwOAJzvsxzWOclxokMGzGBWytdjGXSTMiToAnDEcClmPaa3RCSRjVGzCoWzyFqWkaChWSAAEJ4FsgBGAAmABmPbwfmhaTKWM6LqulpqqCyDW0egg4dKb1tiiAI1xBcG3OyqHsri2r1rW6IUUe0napE-0Bg9BHmaaryTzIoggjXHtqGeVpsjwoD+EoY5EjnCcONA+F9leY09g0nJWsCXw6IJJJOg6xZrPyS72ocTrDEKlcAE9cZmR3FhBVl0Skmz0eZyAyKYcyq1Ka6WLY+6vJrGMlmJOlDvUmG5W9X13gDQZGIcqO7uBXHYot6IudOtx8kegBtey0JIQbIgWf0AF1+ERT0Fhmhwvjp5wACtSliNdMTGhtOTiUoXqZiHIHciIvGNVOm3T2X-UDHP+bq8mPWT9ni65ul-erpsnip2d50XFugPWr2BtqVxJ3uo4QjSfJzKGj0HCnlnZ5+40sqLn0JcAg+zNFXGuTAghxR1GMD0LcbK0haNPZqJ43zkRougjBmDUGfm-L+ACFgPz8BrtIIgRBEQCASMkNImRJzbH2AQNcGtgiQieIYDgHYnBdgFBuNCTBWwkVQZgoRwiKI+QYvZaQiREgdDCjxSKOd3BZTItQAYCFDgdBiBopwARshhGCFxbwCQ6g5EfnKEajCEgsICHYABXJEqtEMD1PqHhpwWN8FY-g+Q4gpGeJEL4eU9ITQyoXHKkRkr5T2NPY6ZkLLrmsnZFokjpGNQ8hLVB0sM6TnlorPS6FwBu1xidaI507bExiEkjohg9oAAY9pfBsoiAAhzmQ4+Q4SjAJO-FwYtZ7RljInRBuNF4xEWqJP0Wcc4VJ3rYoB3NeamhGSQshAh1aaw9PwBh1QEiQErgAEgEnSEEvomFWPck3S8kB9mHPZP4OS7kGhIK8kAA)
